description: Perform a Robust One-Way ANOVA on the Titanic passenger age data ('~/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicSurvival.csv') to compare 'age' (Dependent Variable) across 'passengerClass' (Grouping Variable). The analysis must include Levene's test for homogeneity of variance, Welch's ANOVA, and Games-Howell post-hoc comparisons. Save the Jamovi project to '~/Documents/Jamovi/Titanic_Age_Analysis.omv' and create a text report at '~/Documents/Jamovi/anova_report.txt' documenting the Levene's p-value, Welch's F statistic, Welch's p-value, and the p-value for the post-hoc comparison between 1st and 3rd class.
